headline: Regeneron & Parabilis Sign Oncology Collaboration Worth Up to $2.2B
summary: REGN teams up with Parabilis in a potential $2.2B deal to develop Antibody-Helicon Conjugates targeting hard-to-treat cancers.

headline: GLP-1 Drug Giants Race to Go Global With Their Obesity Pills: ETFs to Gain

headline: Merck's ADC Candidate Meets Goals in Endometrial Cancer Study

headline: Immunic appoints Biogen, Cubist veteran Mike Bonney as board chair ahead of key MS trial readout
summary: Immunic Inc (NASDAQ:IMUX, FRA:10VA), a late-stage biotechnology company developing oral therapies for neurologic diseases, said it has appointed biopharmaceutical veteran Michael Bonney as chair of its board of directors. Bonney brings more than three decades of industry experience, including...

headline: Exelixis Announces Clinical Development Collaboration with Merck for Phase 3 STELLAR-316 Pivotal Trial for Patients with Colorectal Cancer
summary: ALAMEDA, Calif., May 19, 2026--Exelixis, Inc. (Nasdaq: EXEL) today announced that the company has entered into a clinical development collaboration with Merck, known as MSD outside of the United States and Canada, to supply KEYTRUDA QLEX™ (pembrolizumab and berahyaluronidase alfa-pmph) injection for subcutaneous administration in combination with zanzalintinib in STELLAR-316, a planned phase 3 pivotal trial in patients with resected stage II/III colorectal cancer (CRC).
